query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: Extreme close-up portrait of a light-skinned man with short brown hair and blue-gray eyes staring directly at the camera. The frame captures his face from the eyebrows to the lower chin, showing skin texture, faint freckles, and light stubble. He wears a dark-colored garment. The background is a smooth, solid light gray. A small text watermark appears in the bottom left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Extreme close-up portrait of a light-skinned man with short brown hair and blue-gray eyes staring directly at the camera, illuminated by harsh direct flash that creates bright specular highlights on his forehead and nose and casts hard shadows. The frame captures his face from the eyebrows to the lower chin, revealing pore-level skin texture, faint freckles, and light stubble with an unflattering snapshot realism. He wears a dark-colored garment against a smooth, solid light gray background, with a small text watermark in the bottom left corner.
